title: T-052 — Warehouse expiry and shelf-life rules UI surfaces
prompt:
# T-052 — Warehouse expiry and shelf-life rules UI surfaces

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement expiry dashboard, canonical use_by override modal, and Phase 1 Shelf Life Rules CRUD UI.

## Implementation contract
WH-109 Shelf Life Rules CRUD is Phase 1. Build Admin/Manager-only shelf_life_rules_admin_page and shelf_life_rule_edit_modal under Warehouse Settings. M-12 use_by_override_modal is canonical; do not reintroduce stale no-prototype wording.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/expiry/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/settings/shelf-life-rules/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/expiry/** [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx
- design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given expiry_management_page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx, then expired/expiring tabs, use_by/best_before mode filters, cron status, and row actions match.
2. Given use_by_override_modal opens for an expired use_by LP, then Manager/Admin role, acknowledgement, reason_code, and reason_text are mandatory before submit.
3. Given shelf_life_rules_admin_page renders, then Admin/Manager can list/create/edit/disable customer+product min shelf life rules and unauthorized roles see a read-only permission state.
4. Given components are inspected, then data-prototype-label markers exist for expiry_management_page, use_by_override_modal, shelf_life_rules_admin_page, and shelf_life_rule_edit_modal.

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright tests for use_by override required fields and unauthorized role denial.
- GREEN: component tests for shelf_life_rules CRUD validation: customer, product, min days, enforced flag, reason.
- Run pnpm test and pnpm playwright test --grep @warehouse-expiry-ui.

## Risk red lines
- Do not mark WH-109 as P2 or no-prototype.
- Do not let non-manager users override expired use_by blocks.
- Do not enforce 11-SHIPPING min shelf life in Warehouse UI beyond documented contract cues.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
